title: Simple Drying Rack
description: Simple drying rack on which you can dry things
body:
## This mod that adds DryingRack to your game.

### recipes:
![recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b833e6b89109220574eaf24c7c9a7f9e3ff11728.png)

Drying speed depends on whether it is day or night and weather. During the day, items dry twice as fast as at night. when it rains items doesn't dry

30s during the day and 60s at night

Drying rack works with hoppers without the need for an item sorter
